briefdescription.para: DisplayID parameters block length in bytes.
DisplayID timing range minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID device data minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID power sequence minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID transfer characteristics minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID container ID minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID string maximum length.
Maximum number of DisplayID timing modes.
Maximum number of DisplayID short timings.
DisplayID timing descriptor length in bytes.

detaileddescription.para: DisplayID timing descriptor length in bytes (duplicate definition)

briefdescription.para: DisplayID short timing length in bytes.
Maximum DisplayID detailed timing buffer size.
Maximum DisplayID block data size.
DisplayID refresh rate base value in Hz.
DisplayID pixel clock multiplier.
DisplayID detailed timing minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID color characteristics minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID color characteristics legacy length in bytes.
DisplayID color characteristics extended length in bytes.
DisplayID color primary size in bytes.
DisplayID color white point size in bytes.
DisplayID color coordinate divisor for precision.
DisplayID color depth offset.
DisplayID parameters bits per color length.
CIE 1931 color space year identifier.
CIE 1976 color space year identifier.
Maximum standard colorspace index.
DisplayID vendor specific minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID Unicode language code length in bytes.
DisplayID maximum block size in bytes.
DisplayID data block header length in bytes.
DisplayID CIE year bit mask.
DisplayID transfer function ID bit mask.
DisplayID transfer function ID bit shift.
DisplayID temporal color bit mask.
DisplayID number of primaries bit mask.
DisplayID number of primaries bit shift.
DisplayID number of white points bit mask.
DisplayID color lower nibble bit mask.
DisplayID color upper nibble bit mask.
DisplayID color upper nibble bit shift.
DisplayID bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID bits per color bit shift.
DisplayID interface minimum length in bytes.
DisplayID interface extended length in bytes.
DisplayID interface color depth length in bytes.
DisplayID interface pixel clock length in bytes.
DisplayID interface maximum clock length in bytes.
DisplayID maximum interface count.
DisplayID default minimum pixel clock in MHz.
DisplayID interface type for HDMI.
DisplayID maximum pixel clock divisor.
DisplayID color depth 6 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID color depth 8 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID color depth 10 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID color depth 12 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID color depth 14 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID color depth 16 bits per color bit mask.
DisplayID timing descriptor length in bytes.

detaileddescription.para: DisplayID timing descriptor length in bytes (duplicate definition)

briefdescription.para: DisplayID detailed timing divisor.
EDID block size in bytes.
Maximum number of DisplayID CVT timings.
DisplayID interface count bit mask.
DisplayID interface version bit mask.

memberdef.name: xvidc_edid_extension_handlers
memberdef.initializer: = { [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_TIMING] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_CEA] = { xvidc_disp_cea861 }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_VTB] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_XVIDC_EDID_2_0] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DI] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_LS] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_MI] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DID] = { xvidc_dispid_block }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DTCDB_1] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DTCDB_2] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DTCDB_3] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_BLOCK_MAP] = { NULL }, [XVIDC_EDID_EXTENSION_DDDB] = { NULL }, }

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct xvidc_cea861_extended_data_block *const edb, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_disp_cea861_extended_data

briefdescription.para: This function parse EDID on CEA 861 Extended Data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the CEA 861 extended data block.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct xvidc_cea861_extended_data_block *const edb, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_disp_cea861_hf_edid_ext_override_data

briefdescription.para: This function parse EDID on CEA 861 HDMI Forum Extension Override Data Block(HF-EEODB)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the CEA 861 extended data block.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct xvidc_cea861_extended_data_block *const edb, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_disp_cea861_hf_sink_capability_data

briefdescription.para: This function parse EDID on CEA 861 HDMI Forum Sink Capability Data Block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the CEA 861 extended data block.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function parse EDID on CEA 861 Vendor Specific Data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the vendor specific data block.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct xvidc_edid_extension *const ext, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_disp_cea861

briefdescription.para: This function Parse and Display the CEA-861.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the EDID extension block.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct xvidc_edid_extension *const ext, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_dispid_block

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Extension Block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the EDID extension
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct edid *const edid, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn)
memberdef.name: xvidc_disp_edid1

briefdescription.para: This function parse EDID on General Data & VESA Data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the EDID structure.
is a pointer the EDID Control parameter
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: API Define below here are CEA861 routines

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Product Identification data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the product ID block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Display Parameters data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the parameters block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Color Characteristics data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the color block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Video Timing Mode 1 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the timing mode 1 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Video Timing Mode 2 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the timing mode 2 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Short Timings Type 3 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the short timings 3 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID DMT Timings Type 4 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMT timings 4 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID DMT Timings data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMT timings block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID CTA Timings data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the CTA timings block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Video Timing Range data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the timing range block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Product Serial Number data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the serial number block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID GP ASCII String data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the ASCII string block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Display Device Data data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the device data block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Interface Power Sequencing data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the power sequencing block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Transfer Characteristics data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the transfer characteristics block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Display Interface Features data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the interface features block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Stereo Display Interface data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the stereo display block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Short Timings Type 5 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the short timings 5 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Tiled Display Topology data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the tiled display block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Detailed Timings Type 6 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the detailed timings 6 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Detailed Timing data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the detailed timing block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Detailed Timings Type 7 data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the detailed timings 7 block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Adaptive Refresh Rate data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the adaptive refresh block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Bilingual Unicode String data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the unicode string block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID CTA DisplayID 2.0 Data Block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the CTA block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Container ID data block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the container ID block data
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: This function parses DisplayID Vendor-Specific Data Block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the vendor-specific data block
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output

briefdescription.para: Parse EDID data and populate control parameter structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to raw EDID data.
Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to populate.
Verbosity enable flag for debug output.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a single EDID extension block by calling the appropriate handler based on the extension tag.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the EDID extension block.
is a pointer to the EDID Control parameter
enables verbose output for debugging.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *const data, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn, u8 SegmentNum)
memberdef.name: XV_VidC_parse_edid_extension

briefdescription.para: Parse EDID extension block data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to EDID extension block data.
Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to update.
Verbosity enable flag for debug output.
Extension block segment number.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 mmo 24-01-2017 Included into video_common 1.01 eb 13-04-2018 Fixed XV_VidC_parse_edid API and xvidc_edid_extension_handler struct to enhance system stability 1.10 eb 03-08-2018 Updated XV_VidC_parse_edid
